title: Trees Shading [StationAPI]
description: Leaves rendering with shading mimicking b1.8+ ported to beta 1.7.3
body:
# Tree Shading 

**For beta 1.7.3 and STAPI**

Leaves rendering with shading mimicking b1.8+. Based on '_Adventure Update Tree Rendering_' by NFC Vivian, but ported to **StationAPI** with simple Mixin.

Tested on clear Stapi instance and Beta Unleashed 2.0-beta.19.2.

Works with SmoothBeta and Macula.

_It's not whole light engine rework, like newer versions did it, but small change to brighness of leaves only._

![Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2be16f0853f59b7b787aa0c86b4648a1fd613e0_0.webp)
